purpose: Section header within a List. Visually separates groups of items by category, status, or date.
whenToUse: Grouped lists (group by date, status, category)
Long lists that benefit from sectional structure
whenNotToUse: Short lists (< 10 items) — no grouping needed
Tabular data — use Table with grouped Columns
doRules: Always uppercase or title-case for visual hierarchy
dontRules: Do not omit the count when relevant ("Inbox (12)")

layoutGuidance.placement: Place GroupHeaderListItem inside a compatible container (List).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for list item.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
